ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: LeRoy Rice for Ann Daugherty. Lanny Jay (Petitioner) in Pro Per.

Mr. Rice presented his objection to the final distribution and stated that no notice was given to him or his client. In addition, he stated that there was a matter pending in Sonoma County in regard to the assigning of the contract to Mr. Jay. The Court granted the petition for Final Distribution upon review of the order and denied Mr. Rice's request.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
